description: Verso: Tax receipt issued to the khuzzān of the Fayyūm tax districts against revenue delivered by Abū l-Ḥasan b. Wahb. Dated: 14 Ṣafar 404. Measurements: 12.2 × 8.5 cm. Written on a reused petition (see separate entry).
tags: tax receipt, Fatimid, Abu l-Hasan b. Wahb, pinholes, daman
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
